name: io.github.ariffazil/aaa-mcp
description: Constitutional AI Governance with 9 A-CLIP tools, 13 enforced floors (F1-F13), 20+ injection defense patterns, and tri-witness consensus for LLMs.

tools.name: anchor
tools.description: 000_ANCHOR: Constitutional airlock with F11 Authority, F12 Injection Guard (20+ patterns), F13 High-Stakes detection, and adaptive query classification (6 types)

tools.name: reason
tools.description: 222_REASON: Hypothesis generation and analysis with F2 Truth, F4 Clarity, and F8 Genius enforcement (Δ Mind)

tools.name: integrate
tools.description: 333_INTEGRATE: Map and ground external knowledge with F7 Humility (Ω₀ bounds) and F10 Ontology validation (Δ Mind)

tools.name: respond
tools.description: 444_RESPOND: Draft plan and response with F4 Clarity and F6 Empathy checks (Δ Mind)

tools.name: validate
tools.description: 555_VALIDATE: Stakeholder impact analysis with F5 Peace², F6 Empathy, and F1 Amanah (reversibility) checks (Ω Heart)

tools.name: align
tools.description: 666_ALIGN: Ethics and policy alignment with F5, F6, and F9 Anti-Hantu enforcement (Ω Heart)

tools.name: forge
tools.description: 777_FORGE: Synthesize solution into actionable artifact with F2, F4, and F7 enforcement (Ω Heart)

tools.name: audit
tools.description: 888_AUDIT: Final constitutional verdict with F3 Tri-Witness (W₃>=0.95), F11 Authority, and F13 Sovereignty checks (Ψ Soul)

tools.name: seal
tools.description: 999_SEAL: Cryptographic seal and immutable audit with F1 Amanah and F3 Tri-Witness consensus (VAULT)

tools.name: container_list
tools.description: List sovereign stack containers (qdrant, openclaw, agentzero) with 5s TTL caching

tools.name: container_restart
tools.description: Restart containers with F1 Amanah logging and 888_HOLD protection for critical operations

tools.name: container_logs
tools.description: Get container logs with F11/F2 enforcement and configurable tail length

tools.name: sovereign_health
tools.description: Full health check of sovereign stack with F2 Truth and F7 Humility reporting

tools.name: container_exec
tools.description: Execute commands inside containers with F11/F12 injection defense and command validation
